creator: leafy7382@gmail.com
text:
On Mon, Aug 17, 2009 at 5:50 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of devel/eric,
>
> Please note that PR ports/137856 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/137856
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>

Thanks for the update, please go ahead with the patch.
Cheers,

Jiawei


-- 
"If it looks like a duck, walks like a duck, and quacks like a duck, then to
the end user it's a duck, and end users have made it pretty clear they want
a duck; whether the duck drinks hot chocolate or coffee is irrelevant."
